personalInfo.name: Hrishabh Tripathi
personalInfo.title: Power BI Developer & Data Visualization Expert
personalInfo.summary: Expert Power BI Developer with 3+ years of experience creating interactive dashboards, data models, and business intelligence solutions. Specialized in DAX, Power Query, and advanced visualization techniques with strong Azure integration capabilities.

description: Expertise in Power BI for creating interactive dashboards and reports, providing valuable insights into business operations and facilitating data-driven decision-making
Developed comprehensive Power BI solutions integrating data from Azure SQL Database, Oracle, and various data sources
Created advanced DAX calculations and custom measures for complex business metrics and KPIs
Implemented Row-Level Security (RLS) for data governance and user access control
Automated recurring file validation and transformation tasks using VBA, Power Query, and PowerShell, saving over 90% of manual effort
Built interactive dashboards for SLA compliance tracking and trend analysis
Collaborated with business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into effective visualizations

projects.title: Power BI Dashboard for SLA Compliance and Trend Analysis
projects.description: Developed an interactive Power BI dashboard to track SLA (Service Level Agreement) compliance for incidents. Created dynamic reports showcasing SLA metrics and trend analysis over time. Utilized advanced DAX calculations for custom measures and implemented Row-Level Security (RLS) for data visibility control.

certificates.name: Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL-300)

achievements.title: FY24 Q4 Champs Award
achievements.description: Received from DXC Technology Pvt Ltd for being one of the top performers
